samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, cheese, onion, celery, pimientos, parsley and dill
Combine mayonnaise, vinegar, salt and pepper; add to potato mixture and toss to coat
Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- red <
- cheddar cheese
- celery
- pimientos
- parsley
- dill
- mayonnaise
- vinegar
- sugar
- salt
- pepper
- paprika

Instructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, cheese, onion, celery, pimientos, parsley and dill
2. Combine mayonnaise, vinegar, salt and pepper; add to potato mixture and toss to coat
3. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Preheat oven to 375
Lightly grease a cookie sheet
In a large bowl, beat together the oil, brown sugar and eggs
Sift together the flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
Add to creamed mixture
Stir in the oats and raisins
Drop by rounded tablespoons full onto prepared cookie sheet
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until set
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- vegetable <
- brown sugar
- eggs
- flour
- cream of tartar
- baking soda
- salt
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- oats
- raisins

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet
3. In a large bowl, beat together the oil, brown sugar and eggs
4. Sift together the flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
5. Add to creamed mixture
6. Stir in the oats and raisins
7. Drop by rounded tablespoons full onto prepared cookie sheet
8. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until set

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Preheat oven to 350F
Combine shortening, sugar and eggs, and beat well
Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves
Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk
Stir in carrots and raisins, and nuts
Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 8-inch layer pans
Bake 35 to 40 minutes or until tester inserted in center comes out clean
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- shortening
- sugar
- eggs
- flour
- baking powder
- salt
- ground cinnamon
- nutmeg
- cloves
- milk
- carrots
- raisins walnuts

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350F
2. Combine shortening, sugar and eggs, and beat well
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves
4. Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk
5. Stir in carrots and raisins, and nuts
6. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 8-inch layer pans
7. Bake 35 to 40 minutes or until tester inserted in center comes out clean

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Cream butter and sugar until fluffy
Add eggs, one at a time
Add vanilla
Add flour and milk alternately
Add salt
Bake 1 hour at 350
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- butter
- eggs
- vanilla
- milk
- sugar
- flour
- salt

Instructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy
2. Add eggs, one at a time
3. Add vanilla
4. Add flour and milk alternately
5. Add salt
6. Bake 1 hour at 350
